Interface SPARQLParser12ForHeFQUINConstants

All Known Implementing Classes:
SPARQLParser12ForHeFQUIN, SPARQLParser12ForHeFQUINTokenManager
public interface SPARQLParser12ForHeFQUINConstants
Token literal values and constants. Generated by org.javacc.parser.OtherFilesGen#start()
